channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title:
RT @GajVarma: @HumanTechGuy @Teknium Agree. I was surprised that everything worked 100%.
I used to...
item.description:
RT @GajVarma: @HumanTechGuy @Teknium Agree. I was surprised that everything worked 100%.
I used to be a big supporter of OpenClaw.
But I…
--- @Teknium | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 1 | 💬 0 | 👁 0
item.author: @Teknium

item.title: Little quality of life update: Skills should be called more proactively now! ~20% more likely to loa...
item.description:
Little quality of life update: Skills should be called more proactively now! ~20% more likely to load the right skill for the job!
And, of course, in Hermes Agent fashion - it did the prompt improvement and benchmarking itself!
Get more out of the self improvement loop when Hermes Agent more reliably loads and uses the skills it makes :)
https://t.co/5eMhPlvvKh
--- @Teknium | ❤️ 19 | 🔁 2 | 💬 3 | 👁 630
item.author: @Teknium

item.title:
RT @beefnoode: 今天在VPS上装了Hermes Agent
安装过程中会自动识别当前的环境是否安装openclaw 如果有，它就能直接帮你无缝迁移
包括soul、user-profi...
item.description:
RT @beefnoode: 今天在VPS上装了Hermes Agent
安装过程中会自动识别当前的环境是否安装openclaw 如果有，它就能直接帮你无缝迁移
包括soul、user-profile、model-config 以及各种skill 哪些能迁移，哪些不能迁移，…
--- @Teknium | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 1 | 💬 0 | 👁 0
item.author: @Teknium
